name: Featurevisor
description: Featurevisor — Git-based feature flag system for managing flags as code with CI/CD integration.

seo.title: Featurevisor — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Featurevisor: Featurevisor — Git-based feature flag system for managing flags as code with CI/CD integration.

when_to_use: Feature flags as code managed entirely in Git
CI/CD-integrated flag deployments with PR reviews
Segment-based targeting rules defined in YAML
Audit trail via Git history for every flag change

pros: Flags as code with Git-based workflow
Fits GitOps and CI/CD practices naturally
Language-agnostic SDKs fed by generated datafiles
cons: No realtime UI; changes go through PRs
Not ideal for non-engineer flag edits
review.verdict: Clean fit for engineering-driven orgs that want flags in Git and zero flag-service infra to run.
review.best_for: Platform teams running flags via GitOps and CI
review.not_for: PM/marketing-led flag flipping from a dashboard

lock_in.reason: Git-based OSS, flags as code fully portable

developer_experience.reason: CI/CD native, great docs for config-as-code
